productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Exerta Silver Sports Shoes
description: Get yourself an adidas Exerta 4 M and sync your training goals with the absolute best in cushioning, stability and style. Pair this with miCoach compatibles and track your performance, while you enjoy those long, healthy runs in these comfy, durable trainers. Upper Grey mesh uppers provide maximum ventilation Synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counter for enhanced shoe structure Lace-ups for snug Fit Iconic three stripes symbolising elegance and durability in silver on the sides Padded and meshed collar and tongue, soft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole provide all day comfort Midsole Foamy rubber midsole for absolute comfort adiPrene+ midsole in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiency. Heel stabiliser element improves running transitions Torsion system for midfoot integrity adiPrene under the heel for superior cushioning at impact Outsole adiPrene offers under heel impact protection adiWear outsole offers the ultimate in high-wear durability Deep flex grooves with circular nubs all over Decoupled heel Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
